meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.15 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] A base text's 《》 collides with ruby 《》, so it is transcribed ≪≫ (U+226A/B) and the renderer restores 《》 (U+300A/B). The node spans the ≪…≫ run; html is the restored display form. Offsets from the §3 byte model; not read back from a processor.
